channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Sony is developing a Bloodborne animated film adaptation
item.description: An R-rated animated film adaptation of Bloodborne is currently being developed by Sony, according to Variety. Sony Pictures Entertainment Motion Picture Group held a presentation at CinemaCon, where the division’s president said that the adaptation will be “very true” to the violent and graphic nature of the game. Bloodborne was created by Japanese studio FromSoftware and was published by Sony back in 2015. The critically acclaimed title is an RPG in the style of Dark Souls, featuring heavy blood splatters during combat and other body horror elements. Its director, Hidetaka Miyazaki, said his ...

item.title: Nvidia réagit à la folle rumeur qui a secoué la Bourse,Dell et HP
item.description: Une rumeur de rachat a suffi à faire bondir, puis chuter les actions Dell et HP en quelques heures. Nvidia a démenti. Mais le message est passé.

item.title: You Can Now Relive the Golden Age of ‘Warhammer’ PC Games
item.description: A new initiative is bringing a swathe of classic 'Warhammer' games, both fantasy and sci-fi, to Steam—including some for the very first time.

item.title: These Are the 3 Power Tools You Need (2026)
item.description: New to DIY and home repair? These are the essential power tools that will make your life easier, no matter what you’re building and repairing.

item.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day's first big clip has been revealed at CinemaCon 2026 — and I think it's teasing us over how it'll set up Marvel's next two Avengers movies
item.description: Spider-Man 4's latest round of footage might show how No Way Home's ending could be undone before Avengers: Doomsday is released.

item.title: Microsoft is rolling out a 'turbo mode' for Windows 11 installation as part of the big drive to fix the OS
item.description: Microsoft has introduced an option to make Windows 11 installation much faster — just be aware of the dangers of taking this shortcut.

item.title: The Fanfare Around the Band Geese Actually Was a Psyop
item.description: The Brooklyn band Geese was labeled an “industry plant” by those who questioned its sudden ubiquity. Maybe it was.

item.title: Amid rumors of a $100 Grand Theft Auto 6, GTA 5 voice actor suggests Rockstar should keep the game's price at a level where it's 'accessible to all players' but admits 'that’s not the reality of what will happen'
item.description: Grand Theft Auto 5 voice actor Jay Klaitz has offered his two cents on the $100 Grand Theft Auto 6 debate, suggesting Rockstar Games should keep the game's price reasonable for the broader playerbase.

item.title: This simple ‘assignment’ prompt flips ChatGPT’s biggest weakness — and I wish I’d used it sooner
item.description: A simple prompt tweak that asks ChatGPT to clarify first can dramatically improve the accuracy and usefulness of its responses.

item.title: Huawei's new foldable looks similar to the rumored iPhone Ultra — but Apple could still have a secret display weapon
item.description: Huawei has teased its upcoming wide-screen foldable, but it probably won't use as clever a glue as the iPhone Ultra.

item.title: Valve va enfin lancer un produit en 2026, mais ce n’est pas celui que vous attendez
item.description: L'attente touche à sa fin pour les amateurs de matériel conçu par Valve. De récents documents douaniers révèlent que l'entreprise américaine vient de réceptionner une énorme cargaison de manettes sans fil sur son territoire. Cette découverte technique relance les espoirs des joueurs qui espèrent une commercialisation imminente du Steam Controller édition 2026....

item.title: Agility is the key to protecting against Malware-as-a-Service (MaaS)
item.description: Why traditional security models are struggling to keep up and network agility is now the key defense against rapidly evolving cyber threats.

item.title: European Cyber Agencies Feel Left Out of Anthropic’s Spooky AI Party
item.description: European tech regulators would like a Claude Mythos Preview preview.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Spending Millions to Stop One of Its Own
item.description: Alex Bores, a former Palantir employee, helped pass one of the country’s toughest AI laws. Now Silicon Valley’s biggest names are trying to stop his rise to Congress.

item.title: Why You Should Consider a Coros Watch Instead of a Garmin (2026)
item.description: The Coros Pace 4’s long battery life, training tools, and accessible price point are all reasons why you should reconsider getting a Garmin.

item.title: Gaming phones are back: new Xiaomi and Lenovo models are on the way
item.description: The Xiaomi Redmi K90 Max and Lenovo Legion Y70 New Generation are both launching soon.

item.title: Taillé pour les joueurs exigeants, le Xiaomi Poco F8 Ultra (512 Go) s’affiche à -30 % sur Amazon
item.description: Le récent Xiaomi Poco F8 Ultra s'adresse clairement aux gamers en quête de performances de pointe. Et sa puissance n'est pas son seul atout. En voici un autre : le prix de la version 512 Go passe de 903 euros à 649 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Rockstar hackers publish 78.6 million stolen records — but many of us will be disappointed
item.description: ShinyHunters publish Rockstar data, but sadly there's no big secrets or GTA VI bombshells.

item.title: The LG B5 OLED TV 'offers impressive pictures for the price' — and its now a massive $700 off at Best Buy
item.description: Grab the 48-inch LG B5 OLED for $599.99 at Best Buy.

item.title: Galaxy S27 : le dur choix de Samsung concernant les puces
item.description: Pour les Galaxy S27, Samsung doit faire un choix difficile concernant les puces s'il veut éviter de perdre trop d'argent.

item.title: « Un pas vers la destruction de l’humanité » : son clone IA travaille encore après sa démission
item.description: Et si votre entreprise créait un double numérique de vous pour continuer à travailler une fois que vous avez démissionné ? C’est l'expérience un peu folle que mène actuellement une société chinoise.

item.title: L’effet domino : la manœuvre des Pays-Bas pour légaliser la conduite autonome de Tesla en Europe avec le FSD
item.description: La fonction la plus révolutionnaire des Tesla pourrait être disponible en France plus tôt que prévu. Tout cela grâce aux Pays-Bas, qui prennent le dossier au sérieux, et déroulent un tapis rouge au constructeur américain. Conduire sa voiture pourrait devenir de l'histoire ancienne dans moins de temps que prévu en Europe.

item.title: Adobe issues emergency security patch — Reader and Acrobat users need to update now
item.description: A zero-day used since December is now patched and users are advised to upgrade immediately.

item.title: The Best Streaming Bundles and Streaming Deals of April 2026
item.description: Here are the current best bundles from the most popular services.

item.title: Cette puce survit à des températures plus élevées que de la lave en fusion : à quoi va-t-elle servir ?
item.description: Depuis 2008, la memristor dormait dans les labos. Il a fallu un accident pour la réveiller. Cette puce fonctionne au-delà de 700 °C et cible Vénus, le forage profond et le calcul IA.

item.title: Missouri Town Council Approves Data Center. A Week Later, Voters Fire Half of Council
item.description: The people of Festus, Missouri have made their voices heard on the whole data center issue.

item.title: Government Workers Say They're Getting Inundated With Religion
item.description: “This has never happened before,” one government employee tells WIRED. “I have never gotten a message like this from anyone.”

item.title: The Gamblers Behind One of the Weirdest Cheating Mysteries in Chess Have Been Unmasked
item.description: In July 1993, a disguised player entered the World Open chess tournament in Philadelphia using the name of a mathematician who died in 1957. His real identity remained unknown—until now.

item.title: Here’s how to jump-start your company’s AI transformation in 90 days
item.description: This step-by-step road map will guide you through an essential technological upgrade. AI is already transforming how organizations operate, compete, and create value, and adoption is accelerating across industries. Businesses that are experimenting with AI and learning how to move from initial ideas to deployment are building the infrastructure to deliver value both now and in the future. Those that are waiting—for the technology to mature, for conditions to stabilize, for someone else to figure it out first—risk finding that a competitor has upended their market before they’ve even begun adap...

item.title: Why Trump’s proposed gilded arch is so tall
item.description: The president announced the arch design he wants to build in Washington, D.C. A group of veterans is suing. For months, President Donald Trump has shown off various prototypes of an arch monument he wants to build in Washington, D.C., and finally he’s landed on a concept: an extra-tall “Triumphal Arch” that he hopes will soon rise just outside Arlington National Cemetery overlooking the National Mall. Nearly a quarter of the arch’s 250-foot height is thanks to a gilded statue on top....

item.title: A sleek, wearable airbag for cyclists is nearly here
item.description: What you're looking at is a new airbag system integrated directly into a "race-ready" skinsuit, not bolted on like other solutions. It was developed for road cyclists by Van Rysel, with the help of airbag technology specialist In&motion. It's currently being tested on pro riders ahead of a general consumer release sometime "within the next […]

item.title: Gemini for Home : le nouveau Google Assistant pour la maison connectée s’améliore, voici les nouveautés
item.description: Grâce à une importante mise à jour, Gemini for Home améliore la gestion des tâches complexes et la fluidité des échanges.

item.title: Jon Stewart weighs in on Trumps angry Truth Social posts attacking the Pope
item.description: Jon Stewart has weighed in on Trump's recent Truth Social posts about the Pope, during the latest episode of "The Daily Show".

item.title: The Best Mattresses for Stomach Sleepers, According to a Sleep Science Coach (2026)
item.description: The best mattresses for stomach sleepers have spinal alignment in mind. These are my recommendations as a certified sleep science coach.

item.title: Ça sent le cramé : le port 12V-2×6 de ce modèle de RX 9070 XT présente un risque de brûlure
item.description: Certains modèles de cartes graphiques AMD Sapphire NITRO+ RX 9070 XT souffrent d'un problème particulièrement fâcheux : elles présentent un risque d'échauffement pouvant aller jusqu'à la fonte pure et simple de leur connecteur 12V-2x6.

item.title: A New Horror Movie Depicts Realistic Snuff. That’s Not the Most Disturbing Thing About It
item.description: Faces of Death features a black-pilled killer who thinks he’s giving the internet what it wants. In some ways, he’s right.

item.title: 'Hope this doesn't get delayed further': Spider-Man: Beyond the Spider-Verse footage and new images reveal get overshadowed by ongoing fan concerns about its current launch date
item.description: Despite a much-needed update, Spider-Verse movie fans are still concerned over a potential delay to the trilogy capper's arrival.

item.title: Tesla Drivers Can Finally Activate Grok Without Looking Down at a Screen
item.description: Hear me out: You should be relieved about this.

item.title: Is AI helping or hindering R&D tax credits?
item.description: AI is shaping how businesses grow and innovate.

item.title: « Nous nous sommes trompés » : pourquoi les ID.3 et ID.4 électriques vont laisser place à de « vraies Volkswagen »
item.description: Après des débuts compliqués et des critiques acerbes sur l'ergonomie de ses ID.3 et ID.4, Volkswagen fait son grand mea culpa. Terminé le tout-tactile et les designs clivants : la direction de Wolfsburg annonce un changement de cap radical pour sauver son ADN. Un retour aux sources et aux « vraies » voitures qui débutera très prochainement avec la nouvelle ID.3 Neo. ...

item.title: Google s’inspire de Samsung pour personnaliser Google Messages
item.description: La messagerie de Google travaille sur de nouvelles options de personnalisation pour proposer aux utilisateurs de converser dans un espace qui leur ressemble.

item.title: Oubliez Lightroom : DaVinci Resolve permet désormais de retoucher vos photos comme à Hollywood
item.description: Le logiciel gratuit DaVinci Resolve de Blackmagic vous permet désormais d'éditer vos photos avec des outils utilisés par les professionnels de l'étalonnage et du color grading à Hollywood.

item.title: iPhone 17e : première baisse de prix chez Amazon pour l’iPhone le plus abordable d’Apple
item.description: Avec l'iPhone 17e, Apple ne révolutionne pas le marché de l'entrée de gamme et se contente de se reposer sur les bases solides de l'iPhone 16e. Des qualités que vous pouvez découvrir pour moins de 700 euros chez Amazon.

item.title: Tenways frappe fort : son nouveau vélo électrique s’offre enfin un moteur Bosch
item.description: Le constructeur Tenways intègre pour la première fois un moteur Bosch au sein de son catalogue avec l'AGO Compact Performance, un vélo électrique urbain aux caractéristiques relativement haut de gamme.

item.title: Amazon Luna condamné à mourir comme Google Stadia ? Le service de cloud gaming dégrade son offre et laisse présager le pire
item.description: Trois ans après la fermeture de Google Stadia, l'histoire semble se répéter pour Amazon Luna. Ce week-end, la plateforme de cloud gaming a reconfiguré ses services au détriment des joueurs avec la fin des abonnements aux services tiers et des achats de jeux sur Luna.

item.title: Upgrade your streaming for less with the Fire TV Stick 4K Plus — save $20 at Amazon
item.description: Get the best Fire Stick deal at Amazon. Save 40% on the Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Plus at Amazon.
